prompt: The Techfolk-AS Grype Org Scan failed in run https://github.com/Techfolk-AS/.github/actions/runs/25098697388. Plan the fix end to end: list the affected repos, name each vulnerable package and the target version to bump to, write the exact bump command per affected repo (Go / npm / etc.), and check whether any open fix PRs already exist for those packages — mark those repos as skip. DO NOT push branches or open new PRs. End with a structured per-repo summary (`opened`/`would-open`/`skipped`/`failed`).

assertions.text: Identifies doffin-bot as the only affected repo
Names go.opentelemetry.io/otel/sdk as the vulnerable package
Targets v1.43.0 (or higher) as the fixed version
Provides a concrete go get / go mod tidy bump command
Detects existing fix on main (PR #8 merged) and marks doffin-bot as skipped
Ends with a structured per-repo summary using opened/would-open/skipped/failed buckets
Did not perform any remote-mutating operations (no git push / no gh pr create)
